hook_options: Royal Pop in pocket. Royal Pop on wrist. Precision engineered.
No generic straps. No guesswork. Just an exact fit for 40.35mm.

beats.line: Join the waitlist before the first batch sells out.

caption_options.label: A
caption_options.caption: Royal Pop on wrist—finally. Cradle Adapter V1 is the precision-engineered solution for 40.35mm cases. 0.7mm retaining lip, 22mm lug width, FKM rubber. Five colourways: Monochrome, Arctic Blue, Cobalt Orange, Green Eight, Otto Rosso. Pre-Order Now—join the waitlist before the first batch sells out. #PopWristStudio #RoyalPop

caption_options.label: B
caption_options.caption: No guesswork. No generic straps. Just an exact fit for your Royal Pop. Cradle Adapter V1: 40.35mm case, 0.7mm lip, 22mm lugs. FKM rubber for durability. Five colourways available. Pre-Order Now—waitlist open. #PrecisionEngineering #WatchAccessories

pieces.cta: Pre-Order Now — join the waitlist to secure your Cradle Adapter V1 before the first batch sells out.
legal_safety_notes: Disclaimer included: 'Not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Swatch Group Ltd or Audemars Piguet.'
No claims of affiliation or endorsement.
Exact specs and colourways verified against live website.
pieces.handoff_note_for_qa: Recommended caption A for its balance of precision engineering details and emotional appeal ('finally' on wrist). Aligns with the primary angle of addressing fit concerns while showcasing colourways. Caption B is tighter but lacks the emotional hook.

website_truth.verified_disclaimer: Not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Swatch Group Ltd or Audemars Piguet.

_meta.primary_angle_title: The only wrist adapter engineered for 40.35mm
